query:
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, s.supplierName, s.dataSource, c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.externalId = 'S7092';
command:
